name: FPS英雄
short_description: There are many robots in FPS Hero that you need to defeat! Come and relax and unwind in this game!!!
detailed_description:
FPS Hero: This Game

A shooting game that can relieve stress and defeat robots!

The Iron Faced Army is located in a secret warehouse in the ordinary bungalow area of the city. There are a large number of weapon components and energy supplies stored here, and the guards are ordinary robots with a large quantity but low attack power.

Your task is to destroy as many robots as possible in a short period of time

This game offers three levels to choose from

There is also a built-in random attribute store inside

Players can add and click to add different attributes+1

Getting stronger and stronger!!!

The built-in beginner tutorial in the game ensures that you will play this game!

Press and hold the Ctrl key on the left to squat down

Press 1, 2, 3, 4 to switch weapons

Left mouse button for attack

Use WASD to control movement and mouse to control perspective

Use the space bar to jump

When the number of kills reaches a certain value, the skill can be unlocked, and pressing the Q key can obtain acceleration
